subject: Quarterly Board Financial Package
body:
Board Members,

Please find the Q1 2026 financial highlights ahead of our March 28th board meeting:

Revenue: $12.8M (106% of plan)
- Subscription: $11.2M (+38% YoY)
- Services: $1.6M (+12% YoY)

Key Metrics:
- ARR: $48M (up from $35M at Q1 2025)
- Gross Margin: 79.2% (target: 78%)
- Operating Expenses: $11.4M (98% of budget)
- EBITDA: $1.4M (first profitable quarter!)
- Cash: $8.7M (runway: 18+ months at current burn)

Customer Metrics:
- Total customers: 892 (net add: 47)
- Logo churn: 1.8% (best quarter ever)
- Net Revenue Retention: 126%
- Enterprise customers (>$100K ACV): 34

Detailed package with variance analysis, department P&Ls, and cash flow statement will be distributed by March 25th.
